items.title: Conversational link and memory-only Socratic seed
evidence: local exact-head reconstruction: npm test passed 18 of 18 on Linux x64 / Node v22.16.0
npm pack produced workframe-0.2.1.tgz; clean temporary install returned version 0.2.1 and valid status JSON
real PTY synthetic verification: Ctrl+C after consent aborted the in-flight verification, returned stopped:interrupt, and emitted no Socratic prompt
no live provider call, package publication, installation mutation, or non-CLI code change
acceptance: select one existing inference path conversationally without guessing ambiguity
represent account-backed and API-key-backed paths separately and disclose exact payer, credential source, and invocation before consent
require separate explicit consent before one minimal cancellable verification call
remove Docker, SSH, unrelated credentials, and other ambient authority handles from inference children
after a verified path, collect preferred name and first objective
print a bounded memory-only mirror without filesystem or installation mutation
package-local, real-PTY, Windows-semantics, exact-head CI, and packed-artifact checks pass without live credentials

failures: verification was not cancellable after consent
account and API-key billing paths were conflated
inference children inherited Docker and SSH authority handles
the implementation branch was behind and diverged from main
no package or repository CI run was attached to the exact reviewed head

verified_repairs: terminal AbortSignal now reaches HTTP fetch and runtime child process verification
runtime child verification is asynchronous and terminates on interrupt or timeout
questions, hedges, mixed choices, and non-imperative recommendations remain unresolved
account-backed and direct API candidates have separate credential and payer disclosures
inference environments exclude Docker, SSH, and unrelated credential variables
structured assistant responses must equal WORKFRAME_OK exactly
authority, cancellation, terminal, package, and memory-only dialogue tests pass locally
packed npm bin and real PTY interruption evidence pass locally
review_focus: rerun all package tests from PR #9 exact head
verify Windows process and npm-script semantics
verify HTTP and runtime-child cancellation promptly prevents Socratic prompts
verify exact payer and selected-credential disclosure for every candidate
inspect pull-request CI and classify any repository-baseline harness failure separately from package evidence

items.title: Truthful runtime and provider capability graph
Explicit apply and rollback authority gates

invariants: Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read, print, persist, or transmit credential values except directly to the explicitly selected provider after consent.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without explicit approval of a concrete immutable plan.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
